meaning: 昆士兰州[澳大利亚州名]
examples: The man was in a critical condition with severe injuries to his legs after being attacked by a shark in far north Queensland.
People are able to feed the plant by visiting the project at the Queensland library and literally stroking its fronds or soil.
At nine, his father, a naturalist who had started a reptile park on the Queensland coast, taught him to stalk crocs at night and lug them out of the water.
Vause holds a Bachelor of Arts degree in American history from the University of Queensland.
Some of the rarer marsupials are restricted to a small area of northeast Queensland.
